prediction.summary: An insider threat incident involving user emma.hr has been detected. The user, who recently resigned, accessed multiple sensitive files, performed a bulk download of an 842MB archive, copied it to a removable USB device, and then connected a personal cloud sync client. This activity triggered DLP and SIEM alerts for policy violation and data exfiltration, indicating a high-risk data breach.

timeline.event: User emma.hr performed a bulk download of 842MB archive /tmp/eh_export.zip
User emma.hr copied 842MB to removable device E:\backup
User emma.hr connected personal cloud sync client sync.evil-drop.io
DLP policy violation: HR confidential data staged for external sync by emma.hr
SIEM detected insider threat pattern: bulk sensitive file access + USB + cloud sync
SIEM noted user emma.hr resignation submitted 48 hours ago, risk score elevated
SIEM identified MITRE T1530 Data from Cloud Storage / internal collection
HR audit reported emma.hr accessed 47 files outside normal role scope in 54 minutes

recommendations: Immediately revoke all system and data access for user emma.hr.
Isolate and perform a full forensic analysis on LAPTOP-HR-09 to determine the full scope of data accessed and exfiltrated.
Investigate the contents of the /tmp/eh_export.zip archive and the data copied to the removable device and the 'sync.evil-drop.io' cloud service.
Engage HR and Legal teams to initiate appropriate actions regarding data theft and policy violations.
